use thiserror::Error;

#[derive(Error, Debug)]
pub enum AppError {
    #[error("IO error occurred")]
    Io {
        #[source]
        source: std::io::Error,
    },

    #[error("JSON parse error")]
    Json {
        #[source]
        source: serde_json::Error,
    },

    #[error("database error")]
    Database {
        #[source]
        source: sqlx::Error,
    },

    #[error("HTTP error")]
    Http {
        #[source]
        source: reqwest::Error,
    },
}

fn read_data(path: &str) -> Result<String, AppError> {
    let data = std::fs::read_to_string(path).map_err(|e| AppError::Io { source: e })?;
    Ok(data)
}

fn parse_config(json: &str) -> Result<Config, AppError> {
    let config: Config = serde_json::from_str(json).map_err(|e| AppError::Json { source: e })?;
    Ok(config)
}

struct Config;
